name: Cascades Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Cascades Country Club in Tyler, TX! There are 8 courts. 4 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play.

name: Community Christian Fellowship
description: Church member must host and be present with players.
open_play_schedule: Court unavailable during regular youth programs.

name: Faulkner Tennis Center
description: Faulkner Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Tyler, TX. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Fusion Athletic Club
description: The courts are at a local Gym that requires a membership to enter and play at.

name: Glass Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Glass Recreation Center in Tyler, TX! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Hideaway Lake Club
description: Hideaway Lake Club is a place to play pickleball in Hideaway, TX. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and lights. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Players must be a member of HAWL or an accompanied guest of a member to play at the courts.

name: Marvin Methodist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Marvin Methodist Church in Tyler, TX! There are 3 wood courts. 2 are indoors and 1 is outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms, lights, and water.
open_play_schedule: Gym not available the week of July 15, 2024, but will reopen on July 22, 2024.
fees: Private — Public welcome when Marvin Church member is present on Monday evenings and Wednesday mornings.

name: Pollard Park
description: Pollard Park is a place to play pickleball in Tyler, TX. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.

name: Tyler Athletic & Swim Club
description: 4 of the courts are official pickleball courts; and 4 of the courts have portable nets, with pickleball lines on tennis courts.
fees: Fee required — $10 Open play Drop in for Non-Members

name: Tyler Indoor Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Tyler Indoor Pickleball in Tyler, TX! There are 12 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include youth programming, water, restrooms, food, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming.

name: Villages Resort
description: Villages Resort is a place to play pickleball in Flint, TX. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights, food, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Only open to Villages members, Villages homeowners, and their guests.
